brief_notes: Excellent numerical accuracy across all key metrics: AUC values (0.66/0.76, 0.708/0.826), MAE (1.855/1.877), training times (2.5s, 30.3min), inference (30s), ERICA comparisons (70% accuracy, 74% AUC, 54%/86% sensitivity/specificity), and Florida re-grading MAE (4.16 vs 5.02). Comprehensive coverage including all four datasets, both prediction tasks, external validation nuances, and detailed discussion. Writing is notably polished with strong transitions and thorough limitation discussion. Overall score excludes figures axis per rubric.
